JUDGE JOSEPH A DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 09:50AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. MICHAEL HALL FOR THE PLTF. THE DEFT, STEFANIE PHILLIPS, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. WITNESSES S&E AND EXHIBITS IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. COURT TAKES MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, STEFANIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 31A PEARL STREET, S.F. $4,037.00 RENT, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $253.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,790.00, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS PER COST BILL.
